name: Pate Aux Patates (Potato Pie)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Celery stalk, leaves finely chopped
1 pinch Dried Savory OR 1 pinch Chives, fresh
Salt and ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Line a 9-inch pie plate with pastry and trim the edges.
3. Mash potatoes with enough milk to make a smooth puree. Add butter and 1 egg yolk; mix well.
4. In a large bowl, combine mashed potato mixture with onion, celery, parsley, and savory or chives. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Spoon the potato mixture into the pie shell.
6. Cover with top crust, trim and crimp edges to seal. Cut steam vents in the center of the pastry.
7. Brush remaining egg yolk over the top crust.
8. Bake in preheated oven for 30 to 40 minutes or until pastry is golden brown.
9. Serve warm; this recipe yields 6-8 servings.
